source: independent (non-author) general-purpose agent reviewing data/aggregates/build-reasoning.json against the source kit+items; suggested rewrites ground-checked by copy-verify, then applied back

support.quote: Squishy with no safety net — Dekker is a pure utility caster; if her stuns miss she has no damage or escape.
support.issue: says no escape but Rocket Boots passive gives a reposition/escape
support.rewrite: Squishy with no safety net — Dekker is a pure utility caster; if her stuns miss she has little damage to fall back on.

support.quote: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Dekker is a pure utility caster, so if her stuns miss she has no damage or escape.
support.issue: says no escape but Rocket Boots passive gives a reposition/escape
support.rewrite: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Dekker is a pure utility caster, so if her stuns miss she has little damage to fall back on.

support.quote: Little kill power — Dekker is a pure utility caster; if her stuns miss she has no damage or escape, so you just soak damage without threatening anyone.
support.issue: says no escape but Rocket Boots passive gives a reposition/escape
support.rewrite: Little kill power — Dekker is a pure utility caster; if her stuns miss she has little damage to threaten with, so you mostly enable allies.

carry.quote: Paper-thin once the combo's spent — Drongo ramp-up carry with no escape; he folds to dives before his damage comes online.
carry.rewrite: Paper-thin once the combo's spent — Drongo is a ramp-up carry with no escape; he folds to dives before his damage comes online.

carry.quote: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Drongo ramp-up carry with no escape; he folds to dives before his damage comes online.
carry.rewrite: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Drongo is a ramp-up carry with no escape; he folds to dives before his damage comes online.

carry.quote: Squishy with no safety net — Drongo ramp-up carry with no escape; he folds to dives before his damage comes online.
carry.rewrite: Squishy with no safety net — Drongo is a ramp-up carry with no escape; he folds to dives before his damage comes online.

offlane.quote: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Greystone reliant on the ultimate reset; baited out of it he just dies on the dive.
offlane.rewrite: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Greystone is reliant on the ultimate reset; baited out of it he just dies on the dive.

jungle.quote: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Greystone reliant on the ultimate reset; baited out of it he just dies on the dive.
jungle.rewrite: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Greystone is reliant on the ultimate reset; baited out of it he just dies on the dive.

offlane.quote: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Grux hard engage on Stampede/ultimate; if the pick fails he's stranded in the enemy team.
offlane.issue: broken English / jargon ('hard engage'), missing verb
offlane.rewrite: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Grux relies on charging in with Stampede or his ultimate; if it fails he's stranded in the enemy team.

jungle.quote: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Grux hard engage on Stampede/ultimate; if the pick fails he's stranded in the enemy team.
jungle.issue: broken English / jargon ('hard engage'), missing verb
jungle.rewrite: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Grux relies on charging in with Stampede or his ultimate; if it fails he's stranded in the enemy team.

jungle.quote: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Kallari assassin with paper health; if the pick fails she has no second chance.
jungle.rewrite: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Kallari is an assassin with paper health; if the pick fails she has no second chance.

jungle.quote: Penetration and power that cuts healing and deals percent-health.
jungle.issue: Tainted Trident deals bonus damage, not percent-health
jungle.rewrite: Penetration and power that cuts healing and adds bonus damage.

support.quote: Paper-thin once the combo's spent — Maco has thin frontline presence; caught out, he can't protect allies or escape when enemies jump on him.
support.issue: 'frontline' is jargon a new player won't get
support.rewrite: Paper-thin once the combo's spent — caught out, Maco can't protect allies or escape when enemies jump on him.

support.quote: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Maco has thin frontline presence; caught out, he can't protect allies or escape when enemies jump on him.
support.issue: 'frontline' is jargon a new player won't get
support.rewrite: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — caught out, Maco can't protect allies or escape when enemies jump on him.

support.quote: Almost no damage of your own — Maco has thin frontline presence; caught out, he can't protect allies or escape when enemies jump on him.
support.issue: 'frontline' is jargon a new player won't get
support.rewrite: Almost no damage of your own — caught out, Maco can't protect allies or escape when enemies jump on him.

carry.quote: Squishy with no safety net — TwinBlast Rocket Dash is his only out; on cooldown he's a squishy with no escape.
carry.issue: contradicts itself: names Rocket Dash as his escape then says no escape
carry.rewrite: Squishy and reliant on Rocket Dash — it's his only escape, so once it's on cooldown he has no way out.

midlane.quote: Squishy with no safety net — TwinBlast Rocket Dash is his only out; on cooldown he's a squishy with no escape.
midlane.issue: contradicts itself: names Rocket Dash as his escape then says no escape
midlane.rewrite: Squishy and reliant on Rocket Dash — it's his only escape, so once it's on cooldown he has no way out.

carry.quote: Squishy with no safety net — Wraith is fragile and reliant on positioning; caught out he dies fast.
carry.issue: 'no safety net' wrong: kit gives Surprise, Surprise! stealth escape
carry.rewrite: Squishy and reliant on positioning — outside his Surprise, Surprise! stealth he dies fast if caught.

midlane.quote: Squishy with no safety net — Wraith is fragile and reliant on positioning; caught out he dies fast.
midlane.issue: 'no safety net' wrong: kit gives Surprise, Surprise! stealth escape
midlane.rewrite: Squishy and reliant on positioning — outside his Surprise, Surprise! stealth he dies fast if caught.

offlane.quote: Paper-thin once the combo's spent — Zarus Coliseum traps him in with the enemy; pick the wrong target and he's outnumbered.
offlane.issue: contradicts Barricade damage reduction and Gladiator self-heal; also garbled
offlane.rewrite: Committed once Coliseum drops — Zarus traps himself in with the enemy; pick the wrong target and he's outnumbered.
